    1. request(PrintStream)
    2. receive(Scanner)
    3. execute(Scanner, PrintStream)

Interface Prompt<T>

Type Parameters:
T - What kind of value this prompt is for.
All Known Implementing Classes:
IntLimitedPrompt, IntPrompt, StringPrompt
public interface Prompt<T>
Defines the behaviour of a prompt.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default T
    execute(Scanner in, PrintStream out)
    Execute the prompt by asking the user and reading until a satisfactory value is read.
    T
    receive(Scanner in)
    Read a value.
    void
    request(PrintStream out)
    Tell the user what you want.

  • Method Details

    • request

      void request(PrintStream out)
      Tell the user what you want.
      Parameters:
      out - Output to write to.

    • receive

      T receive(Scanner in) throws BadUserInputException
      Read a value.
      Parameters:
      in - The input.
      Returns:
      The value read.
      Throws:
      BadUserInputException - Indicate that the user input was bad.

    • execute

      default T execute(Scanner in, PrintStream out)
      Execute the prompt by asking the user and reading until a satisfactory value is read.
      Parameters:
      in - The input to read from.
      out - The output to write to.
      Returns:
      The value provided by the user.
